betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Technetium-99§f

§aYour first fission product — a mild radioactive waste that unlocks corrosion-resistant alloys!§f

§bTechnetium-99§f (Tc-99) is a common waste product from the fission of uranium and plutonium. It has a relatively high half-life for a fission product, so its radioactivity is only mild at §e2.75 RAD/s§f.

§6Production§f:
§b• Depleted ZIRNOX Fuel§f — process spent uranium, plutonium, or MOX fuel rods
§b• Depleted Research Reactor Fuel§f — same process
§b• U-235 Short-Lived Waste§f — Tc-99 makes up §e20%§f of non-depleted U-235 type short-lived nuclear waste

§6Uses§f:
§b• Technetium Steel§f — combine with steel for extreme corrosion resistance
§b• Self-Charging Batteries§f — makes low-output perpetual power sources

§eTip§f: Technetium-99 is the §bfirst fission product§f most players encounter. Start with ZIRNOX spent fuel — it's the easiest source. Every uranium-based fuel (except natural uranium, MOX, and plutonium) will yield Tc-99 when reprocessed!
